title: ST JOHNS SWAPNPLAY - 211info
text: ST JOHNS SWAPNPLAY ST JOHNS SWAPNPLAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community space for families to play and connect. With 7 unique indoor and outdoor play zones focused on supporting healthy childhood development, it also offers 2 "swapping" rooms where items like books, toys, gear, and other items can be donated and shared. Other services include parent-child activities, parent networking opportunities, meet-ups, and classes. 7535 N Chicago Avenue Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-7, older siblings welcome Hours: Monday-Saturday by appointment Email (971) 251-0074 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 251-0074 Main phone Main phone (971) 251-0074 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: $25 enrollment fee. Sliding scale fee and financial hardship membership available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 4, 16, 44, and 75 Services: Children's Play Groups Parent to Parent Networking Parent/Child Activity Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
